scripts.build:man: bash scripts/with-target-lock.sh shared env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-$HOME/.cache/git-mesh/cargo-target}/git-mesh/build" cargo run --quiet --locked --bin gen-manpage -- man/git-mesh.1
scripts.build: yarn build:man && bash scripts/with-target-lock.sh shared env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-$HOME/.cache/git-mesh/cargo-target}/git-mesh/build" cargo build --release --locked
scripts.build:clean: bash scripts/cleanup-stale-target.sh && bash scripts/clean-shared-build.sh && yarn build
scripts.test: bash scripts/with-target-lock.sh shared env CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-$HOME/.cache/git-mesh/cargo-target}/git-mesh/build" cargo nextest run --build-jobs 1 --locked
scripts.lint: bash scripts/with-target-lock.sh shared env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 RUSTFLAGS="-W unused -W dead-code" CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-$HOME/.cache/git-mesh/cargo-target}/git-mesh/check" cargo clippy --quiet --locked -- -D warnings
scripts.typecheck: bash scripts/with-target-lock.sh shared env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 RUSTFLAGS="-W unused -W dead-code" CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-$HOME/.cache/git-mesh/cargo-target}/git-mesh/check" cargo check --quiet --locked
scripts.udeps: bash scripts/with-target-lock.sh shared env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-$HOME/.cache/git-mesh/cargo-target}/git-mesh/udeps" cargo +nightly udeps
